mapper.sql: fu.id, fu.avatar_id as fua_id, fu.username, fu.description, fu.salt, fu.email, fu.password, fu.phone, fu.last_password_reset_time, fu.enabled_flag, fu.employee_id as pe_id, fu.create_time, fu.create_by, fu.update_time, fu.update_by, fu.attribute1, fu.attribute2, fu.attribute3, fu.attribute4, fu.attribute5

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.avatar_id as ${tAlias}_fua_id, ${tAlias}.username as ${tAlias}_username, ${tAlias}.description as ${tAlias}_description, ${tAlias}.salt as ${tAlias}_salt, ${tAlias}.email as ${tAlias}_email, ${tAlias}.password as ${tAlias}_password, ${tAlias}.phone as ${tAlias}_phone, ${tAlias}.last_password_reset_time as ${tAlias}_last_password_reset_time, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5

select
,
, pe.id as pe_id, pe.work_card as pe_work_card, pe.name as pe_name, pe.id_number as pe_id_number, pej.dept_id as fd_id, pej.dept_name as fd_dept_name, pej.job_id as fj_id, pej.job_name as fj_job_name, fdev.ext_dept_name AS fd_ext_dept_name, fdev.ext_department_name AS fd_ext_department_name, fdev.ext_team_name AS fd_ext_team_name from fnd_user fu left outer join fnd_user_avatar fua on fu.avatar_id = fua.id left outer join pm_employee pe on pe.id = fu.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 left outer join pm_employee_job pej on pej.employee_id = fu.employee_id and pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 left outer join fnd_dept_ext_v fdev on pej.dept_id = fdev.id and fdev.enabled_flag = 1 and fdev.deleted_flag = 0
mapper.insert: insert into fnd_user (avatar_id, username, description, salt, email, password, phone, enabled_flag, employee_id, last_password_reset_time, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5) values (#{userAvatar.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{lastPasswordResetTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update fnd_user set username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email, jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
WITH cte as (
select fd.id as dept_id, fd.parent_id as dept_parent_id, fd.dept_name, fd.admin_job_id, fd.dept_level as dept_level from fnd_dept fd where fd.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.deleted_flag = 0 and fd.id = #{deptId, jdbcType=BIGINT} union all
select fd.id as dept_id, fd.parent_id as dept_parent_id, fd.dept_name, fd.admin_job_id, fd.dept_level as dept_level from fnd_dept fd
INNER JOIN cte cte_pa on fd.id = cte_pa.dept_parent_id and fd.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.deleted_flag = 0 ) select temp.dept_name, temp.dept_level , fj.job_name , isnull(fu.email,pe.email_inside) as email from cte temp left join fnd_job fj on temp.admin_job_id = fj.id left join pm_employee_job pej on pej.dept_id = temp.dept_id and pej.job_id = fj.id and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1 join pm_employee pe on pe.id = pej.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0 join fnd_user fu on fu.employee_id = pe.id and fu.enabled_flag = 1 where fj.enabled_flag = 1 and isnull(pe.email_inside, fu.email) <> '' and isnull(pe.email_inside, fu.email) is not null and isnull(pe.email_inside, fu.email) <> '@in-sunten.com'

select isnull(pe.email_inside, fu.email) as email from fnd_user fu join pm_employee pe on fu.employee_id = pe.id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0 and fu.enabled_flag = 1 and exists ( select 1 from fnd_user fut join fnd_users_roles fur on fut.id = fur.user_id and fut.id = fu.id join fnd_role fr on fur.role_id = fr.id and fr.permission = #{permission, jdbcType = VARCHAR} ) and isnull(pe.email_inside, fu.email) <> '' and isnull(pe.email_inside, fu.email) is not null and isnull(pe.email_inside, fu.email) <> '@in-sunten.com'

select isnull(pe.email_inside, fu.email) as email from fnd_user fu join pm_employee pe on fu.employee_id = pe.id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0 and fu.enabled_flag = 1 and isnull(pe.email_inside, fu.email) <> '' and isnull(pe.email_inside, fu.email) is not null and isnull(pe.email_inside, fu.email) <> '@in-sunten.com' and pe.id = #{employeeId, jdbcType = BIGINT}
select pe.name from pm_employee pe join fnd_user fu on fu.employee_id = pe.id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and fu.id = #{id, jdbcType = BIGINT}
SELECT fu.username, fu.attribute1 FROM [dbo].[fnd_user] fu where enabled_flag = 1 and fu.attribute1 is not null

where 1 = 1
and (pe.work_card like ('%' + #{str,jdbcType=VARCHAR} + '%') or pe.name like ('%' + #{str,jdbcType=VARCHAR} + '%'))

select case when EXISTS (select 1 from fnd_user fu join fnd_users_roles fur on fu.id = fur.user_id and enabled_flag = 1 join fnd_role fr on fr.id = fur.role_id and fr.permission = #{permission, jdbcType = VARCHAR} where fu.employee_id = #{employeeId, jdbcType = BIGINT}) then 1 else 0 end
select email from fnd_user where username = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and enabled_flag=1
